author: Koray Tugberk Gubur
title: Thoughts on AI Search and AI-based SEO
content: Medium article providing insights on AI Search and AI-based SEO. Koray shares his perspective on how AI is fundamentally changing search optimization. Discusses the transition from traditional SEO to AI-driven search optimization (AEO - AI Engine Optimization). Covers how large language models interpret content, the importance of semantic clarity, and how brands need to adapt their strategies for AI-based search engines. Key insight: AI Commerce and Agentic Commerce won't be innovations in 2026 - they'll be standard expectations.
